title: Bel Trough Plant Pot Plastic Winchester Bel Garden Flower Patioectangle Planter UK (4PC, Terracotta), 46cm & 60cm
features: Get ready for this years growing season with this large Planter., Made In UK

Made from durable plastic, lightweight and strong, with sturdy walls, and rippled walls means that it won't crack and will it last for many planting seasons. Floor of pot is solid, but drain holes can easily be drilled at the intended places, if necessary.
This Large Garden Large Trough is perfect for all purpose planting, with it's large 60cm length you can plant a wide range of Flowers,
Can be used indoors or outdoors. Stackable
